name: Villain Draft
tagline: Build your rogues' gallery. The Commentator is judging you.

items.text: The mastermind who narrates the plan while it is already working
The corporate villain whose evil is technically legal
The mentor who turned, and still corrects the hero's form mid-fight
The cosmic entity that does not know it is the villain
The charming con artist you would forgive a third time
The zealot knight who is the hero of their own tragic story
The AI that optimized exactly what it was told to optimize
The petty bureaucrat whose stamp can end kingdoms
The overbearing parent whose love is a cage
The trickster god who causes the plot for fun and leaves
The double agent whose true loyalty is revealed on the last page
The vengeful spirit with a legitimate grievance and poor methods
The crime family matriarch who runs everything from a kitchen table
The rival genius who just wants the hero to admit they are second best
The quiet neighbor who was in the background of every scene
The hive queen whose children are everywhere already
